failing_nodes.message: No generate_qa_qc_report() function found. Pipeline does not call qa_qc module or produce qa_qc_report.csv.

summary: Phase 5 REJECT: qa_qc_report.csv has never been committed. The qa_qc.py module exists with missingness_summary(), duplicate_timestamps(), out_of_range_values(), and coverage_summary() functions, but cleaning.py has no integration — no generate_qa_qc_report() function, no import of qa_qc functions, and no pipeline step that writes the report. All 6 acceptance criteria fail because the core deliverable (the report artifact) is missing. Exit gate: 1 failed, 4 skipped.
